name: Satoru Gojo and Suguru Geto
description:
|"Don't be afraid, come here, it's so nice and cozy in the water."|

in which orca!Suguru spots a cute seal!user by an underwater ice floe, and orca!Satoru scares them off

Author's Note

Someone asked for more orca bots, well, the bot is written in a hurry, but I hope I didn't miss any elements. I have three exams next week, and instead of preparing, I write bots to you...

welllll

I also tried to find the right art, but I couldn't find it

English is not my first language, so if there are typos in the text, please forgive and understand. I'm using a translator

Bot Notes

·𖥸· Orca!Suguru, Orca!Satoru, Seal!User

·𖥸· It's just a world of hybrids and humans, that's all

·𖥸· I coded that male killer whales use the following methods to attract potential partner: vocalizations, body postures, and aggressive displays. Well, just because why not?

·𖥸· I also coded their reproductive system, I hope the bot understands this

·𖥸· Satoru and Suguru are up to 3 meters tall, starting at the top of their heads and ending at the tip of their tails.

·𖥸· You are a very cute and appetizing seal :)
